name: servix
description: SERVIX — Marketplace de Serviços Sob Demanda

scripts.db:up: docker-compose up -d postgres redis minio mailhog
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && sleep 5 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
